Skills.Name: Cryomancy
Skills.Description: Cold mastery. Cold-element spells deal +25% damage when the target is Wet or Frozen. Pair with a water-source mutation to soak the target first, then chill them for the freezerburn bonus.

Powers.Name: Brittle Strike
Powers.Description: +50% melee damage on Frozen targets, applied as bonus Cold damage. Works with any weapon — your spells set up the kill, your blade finishes it.

Powers.Name: Frost Retort
Powers.Description: When an attack on you misses, your chill aura nips back — 3 Cold damage to the attacker.
